title: Rescue Rocket
description: A rocket to rescue you from danger!
body:
Rescue Rocket is a datapack that adds one new item. The Rescue Rocket.

It can be crafted with a Firework Rocket and a Nether Star in a Smithing table:\
![Rescue Rocket recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6041ff5a5098323ecf7bec0ef17fe12f516c5ccf.png)\
(All NBT data will be kept by the resulting Rescue Rocket. Flight Duration, Effects, Etc.)

When launched, the player will start riding the rocket and be carried high into the air, or you can dismount early.
After the rocket dies out, you will gain slow falling until you hit the ground, and regeneration for 5 seconds.

The rocket can also work underground and will teleport the player until it reaches the surface.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/CGpWPaMmhQs" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
